title: phyllanthus multilocularis
intro: Phyllanthus multilocularis, also known as Airy Shaw's gooseberry, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae that is native to tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus multilocularis include its potential to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as capsules and extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
